content.en:
After the fall of the Ancestor of the Self-Named Sword Domain, Ye Tian, under the intelligence of the Battle Gate, found several four-star masters of the Ghost Fox Organization and killed them one by one in the name of challenge.

The four-star master is not a weak person, even if it is placed in the Dark Sacred Domain, it is also the real powerhouse among the strongest domain ancestors, and the first strongest domain ancestor in many sects is estimated to be at the level of a four-star master.

Moreover, this kind of four-star master also has the hope of becoming a four-star king and becoming the face of the ghost fox organization.

Therefore, the fall of many four-star masters is also a huge loss for the Ghost Fox Organization.

......

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, you are looking for !!! death"

The Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor said angrily.

The Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor actually went to challenge the four-star master of their Ghost Fox Organization this time, which was something he didn't expect.

No, that's not a challenge, it's a massacre!

In his opinion, this is not a challenge at all, but revenge!

At this moment, the Bird Battle Domain Ancestor's killing intent towards Ye Tian rose to the limit, and he couldn't wait to kill Ye Tian immediately.

"All the Supreme Domain Ancestors are hiding, and all four-star diamonds and four-star masters have entered the branch and are not allowed to show their faces!"

The Bird War Domain Ancestor gave this order.

This is also no way, the intelligence ability of the battle gate is very strong, and if the four-star master is hidden, it is easy to be found, and he will die in the hands of the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain.

Therefore, in order to ensure that the four-star master is not lost, it is necessary to hide in the branch.

As for the other Supreme Domain Ancestors, he couldn't control it, so he could only choose to hide by himself.

However, he felt that the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors would not go to trouble ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestors, because there were too many of them, and they were not important to the Ghost Fox Organization, so it was useless to kill more.

At the same time, he informed the four-star kings of the Ghost Fox Organization that Ye Tian was here.

--------------------

"The four-star master is gone!"

Ye Tian received the summons from the Battle Gate, and immediately understood that the Ghost Fox Organization was also afraid, so he let the four-star masters hide.

After all, there are not many four-star masters in the Ghost Fox Organization, and they have lost some in the Xuanxu Saint Realm before, and now they have lost several more, which can be described as a heavy loss.

If this continues, the four-star master of the Ghost Fox Organization is afraid that it will be broken, so he can only choose to hide.

"Since the four-star master of the Ghost Fox Organization is hiding, then go directly to the branch of the Ghost Fox Organization and challenge the four-star king!"

Ye Tian decided.

On the surface, the Ghost Fox Organization only revealed two branches, one in the Sea and the other in the Wasteland.

The sea is a magical sea wrapped in countless thunders, which is suitable for the cultivation of the Thunder Domain Ancestor, and there are many branches of the forces located there, and a branch of the Ghost Fox Organization is hidden there, and the general forces don't know about it, but the Battle Gate, as the Holy Gate, naturally investigated it.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the sea of Qihai.

Thundered!!!!!

Above the sea, thunder rolls, full of infinite vitality and destruction.

Ye Tian ignored this thunder and entered the sea of thunder.

The sea is very huge, it can be called boundless, even if the ancestor wants to cross the entire sea of Qihai, it takes a lot of time, and its area is even larger than the current Daoshan realm, which shows how big the sea is.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the vicinity of a thunder island.

This Thunder Island is shrouded in mist, lightning flashes and is full of mystery.

And this is one of the branches of the Ghost Fox Organization, also known as the Thunder Island Branch.

"Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor, come out!"

Ye Tian said loudly.

According to the intelligence, the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor was in this branch, and if he didn't come out, he would keep shouting, and even attract other Domain Ancestors.

When the time comes, it will be the Ghost Fox Organization that will lose face.

Therefore, it is impossible for the Ghost Fox Organization not to send people out.

Ray Island Division.

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor knew that Ye Tian was shouting outside the branch, and immediately wanted to go out to kill Ye Tian, but was stopped by an invincible domain ancestor in this branch.

"Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor, Lord Bird Battle Domain Ancestor has an order, you must wait for several other four-star kings to arrive together before you can go out to fight with the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, we must guarantee to win, and you alone are definitely not the opponent of the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor!"

Invincible Domain Ancestral Thunder Steel Domain Ancestral Dao.

"Lord Lei Gang, do you look down on me?"

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor said unpleasantly.

"It's not that I look down on you, but the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain is a Holy Endower, and he has entered the Battle Ancestor Realm to cultivate for a period of time before, and his strength may be stronger than what we know!" Lei Gang Domain Ancestor reminded.

"I understand, when those four-star kings arrive, I'll go out!"

Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor said helplessly.

As time passed, a four-star king rushed to the Thunder Island branch.

At the same time, the Thunder Steel Domain Ancestor of the Thunder Island Branch appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, Lei Steel Domain Ancestor is at a critical juncture in cultivation, I hope Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor will wait for some days, can you?"

Lei Gangyu Ancestor said apologetically.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian knew that the Ghost Fox Organization might be gathering the four-star kings, but he was not afraid, so he nodded.

The four-star kings of the Ghost Fox Organization gathered one by one, which was a good thing for him, at least he didn't need to look for them one by one.

If these four-star kings were killed, it would be enough to make the Ghost Fox Organization feel heartache.

In the blink of an eye, a few years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and looked into the distance.

"The Supreme Domain Ancestor is here!"

As soon as the words fell, a three-meter-tall majestic man appeared, holding a large axe in his hand, exuding a terrifying aura.

"Four-Star King - Mangu Domain Ancestor!"

Then, another person appeared, it was another four-star king of the Ghost Fox Organization, the Black Scale Domain Ancestor!

However, the two four-star kings that Ye Tian cared more about, the Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor and the Xuan Ghost Domain Ancestor, did not appear.

Ye Tian guessed that the Ghost Fox Organization probably wanted to test his strength, and would not immediately dispatch the two strongest four-star kings.

Ye Tian didn't care, if it was before, he might have been worried about his lack of strength, but now that he has come out of the realm of time, his strength has risen greatly, so he is naturally not afraid of these four-star kings.

The Black Scale Domain Ancestor, the Mangu Domain Ancestor, the Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor, and the three four-star kings appeared.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, you want to challenge me?"

Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor said coldly.

"Not bad!"

Ye Tianying said.

"Then come, today I will kill you and avenge the fallen Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Ghost Fox Organization!"

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor roared, turning into thunder and rushing towards Ye Tian.

"Holy Skill - Thunder Blast!"

With a wave of his hand, countless thunderbolts burst out and turned into a thunder domain, enveloping this area, naturally covering the place where Ye Tian was.

This holy technique is a large-scale holy skill, and there is almost no way to avoid it.

Ordinary four-star masters are almost certain to die when they face this move.

The Thunder Dove Domain Ancestor didn't expect this move to kill Ye Tian, but at least there was hope that it would hurt Ye Tian.

However, he underestimated Ye Tian's defenses.

The Extreme Realm's Holy Armor Sacred Technique plus the Extreme Realm's Golden Body Sacred Armor, these two great Sacred Techniques were activated, making Ye Tian's defense reach a terrifying level, and the Thunder Domain couldn't hurt him at all.
